name: Caramel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the brown sugar and flour (or arrowroot) together in the top of a double boiler.
- Arrowroot will make a less "pasty" sauce. If using arrowroot, do not let the sauce boil or it will not thicken properly.
2. Add the melted butter and stir well.
3. Over gently boiling water, cook the mixture, stirring occasionally for about five minutes.
4. Slowly add the boiling water to the sugar mixture while continuing to stir constantly.
5. Continue cooking and stirring until the sauce is thickened.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
7. Serve immediately or cool and store in the refrigerator up to about 3 months.
